content: Apple's xcrun safari-web-extension-converter converts a MV3 web-extension directory into an Xcode Safari Web Extension project (app + appex). The Safari extension appex is packaged INSIDE the .app bundle and submitted together to the Mac App Store. Caveats: converter creates only 1 icon (need full set), doesn't copy manifest version; MV3 conversion has rough edges. Chrome/Firefox extensions are distributed separately via their own web stores (not inside the .app), so App Review only covers the Safari appex; the app's loopback server still serves all browsers.
